rationale: In the citing paper, Bronnenberg and Sismeiro (2002) appears in the literature review and Table 1 as one example of prior work on spatial/serial dependence, including a brief note that it models dynamic shocks in price effects. The citation is mainly used to situate the field and support the gap statement, rather than to supply a specific mechanism, measure, or estimation procedure that the new paper directly reuses. The citing paper's core estimation and optimization development is tied to Baltagi et al. (2007) and the authors' own spatiotemporal HJB framework, so this specific citation functions as background mention.
